title: Structure Studio Run Workspace Topology
forbids: Run in Game request workspace artifact-contract ownership drifting out of the private shared workspace package
why: Packet 8 makes the generation manifest the private handoff between the Studio server writer and Swooper generator reader, so the schema, paths, artifact id, and correlation helpers live in a shared foundation package rather than server internals.
remediate: Keep Run in Game request-workspace path, manifest, artifact id, and correlation helpers under packages/studio-run-workspace/src.
message: Studio Run in Game workspace topology drifted.
